style_effects: Subtle heat haze rises from Mr. Mime's metallic joints, distorting the air like a mirage, while glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically along his armor seams. Metallic dust particles swirl in slow motion, catching the light with a shimmering sheen, and a cool blue-white aura encircles his body in a tight, geometric halo. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
